changes.from: P_{n,B_n,epsilon} = {p in [0,1]^{m_n} : epsilon <= p_k <= 1-epsilon for every k in I_n, and sum_{k in I_n} p_k = B_n}
changes.to: P_{n,B_n,epsilon} = {p in (0,1)^{m_n} : epsilon <= p_k <= 1-epsilon for every k in I_n, and sum_{k in I_n} p_k = B_n}

changes.from: g_k(G_n,p) = n^(-1) sum_{i,j in O_n : k in S_{ij}(G_n)} {-(product_{ell in S_{ij}(G_n)} p_ell^(-1)) p_k^(-1) + (product_{ell in S_{ij}(G_n)} (1-p_ell)^(-1)) (1-p_k)^(-1)}
changes.to: g_k(G_n,p) = partial{V_env(G_n,p)/4}/partial p_k = n^(-1) sum_{i,j in O_n : k in S_{ij}(G_n)} {-(product_{ell in S_{ij}(G_n)} p_ell^(-1)) p_k^(-1) + (product_{ell in S_{ij}(G_n)} (1-p_ell)^(-1)) (1-p_k)^(-1)}
